_notes: Canonical local runtime is the pi/extensions/local-llm.ts extension: Mozilla llamafile serves the OpenAI-compatible local LLM endpoint on 127.0.0.1:8082, and Mozilla whisperfile handles local audio transcription. No native build/systemd fallback is canonical. The only supported local LLM is LiquidAI/LFM2.5-8B-A1B-GGUF Q4_K_M (GGUF file: LFM2.5-8B-A1B-Q4_K_M.gguf).
